## Meeting Purpose

[To train Oluwatimilehin on using Strapi CMS for publishing blog posts for growthx.ai](https://fathom.video/share/WQPWca_xxVhFgNUHfiBWM1yzFgdQKgYM?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Strapi CMS workflow: content manager \> blog post \> create new entry \> fill details](https://fathom.video/share/WQPWca_xxVhFgNUHfiBWM1yzFgdQKgYM?tab=summary&timestamp=11.0)
  - [SEO optimization crucial: meta title/description, social media metadata, keywords](https://fathom.video/share/WQPWca_xxVhFgNUHfiBWM1yzFgdQKgYM?tab=summary&timestamp=331.0)
  - [Content in Markdown format; use Cursor or online converter for formatting](https://fathom.video/share/WQPWca_xxVhFgNUHfiBWM1yzFgdQKgYM?tab=summary&timestamp=667.0)
  - [CTAs categorized by funnel stage; select appropriate CTA for each post](https://fathom.video/share/WQPWca_xxVhFgNUHfiBWM1yzFgdQKgYM?tab=summary&timestamp=388.0)
  - [Save all details at once; don't leave incomplete entries in the CMS](https://fathom.video/share/WQPWca_xxVhFgNUHfiBWM1yzFgdQKgYM?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)

## Topics

### Strapi CMS Navigation and Basic Setup

  - [Access Strapi CMS via provided login credentials](https://fathom.video/share/WQPWca_xxVhFgNUHfiBWM1yzFgdQKgYM?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Navigate to Content Manager \> Blog Post \> Create New Entry](https://fathom.video/share/WQPWca_xxVhFgNUHfiBWM1yzFgdQKgYM?tab=summary&timestamp=23.0)
  - [Fill in title and select category for the blog post](https://fathom.video/share/WQPWca_xxVhFgNUHfiBWM1yzFgdQKgYM?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [SEO section: Add meta title and meta description (optimized for character limits)](https://fathom.video/share/WQPWca_xxVhFgNUHfiBWM1yzFgdQKgYM?tab=summary&timestamp=331.0)
  - [Meta social: Add titles and descriptions for Facebook and Twitter (60-65 char limit)](https://fathom.video/share/WQPWca_xxVhFgNUHfiBWM1yzFgdQKgYM?tab=summary&timestamp=400.0)
  - [Add keywords, set structured data to null, input canonical URL](https://fathom.video/share/WQPWca_xxVhFgNUHfiBWM1yzFgdQKgYM?tab=summary&timestamp=277.0)

### Content Formatting and Upload

  - [Content should be in Markdown format](https://fathom.video/share/WQPWca_xxVhFgNUHfiBWM1yzFgdQKgYM?tab=summary&timestamp=635.0)
  - [Use Cursor app or online text-to-markdown converter](https://fathom.video/share/WQPWca_xxVhFgNUHfiBWM1yzFgdQKgYM?tab=summary&timestamp=667.0)
  - [Remove H1 from content (already defined in title field)](https://fathom.video/share/WQPWca_xxVhFgNUHfiBWM1yzFgdQKgYM?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Add appropriate CTA at the end of the content (based on funnel stage)](https://fathom.video/share/WQPWca_xxVhFgNUHfiBWM1yzFgdQKgYM?tab=summary&timestamp=498.0)
  - [Use "Add a component to slices" to include related blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/WQPWca_xxVhFgNUHfiBWM1yzFgdQKgYM?tab=summary&timestamp=1021.0)

### Category and Tag Management

  - [Use Airtable to generate category and tags](https://fathom.video/share/WQPWca_xxVhFgNUHfiBWM1yzFgdQKgYM?tab=summary&timestamp=315.0)
  - [Paste generated category and tags into respective CMS fields](https://fathom.video/share/WQPWca_xxVhFgNUHfiBWM1yzFgdQKgYM?tab=summary&timestamp=315.0)

### Final Steps and Quality Check

  - [Review all fields and click "Save"](https://fathom.video/share/WQPWca_xxVhFgNUHfiBWM1yzFgdQKgYM?tab=summary&timestamp=1536.0)
  - [Use OpenGraph preview to check how the post appears in search results](https://fathom.video/share/WQPWca_xxVhFgNUHfiBWM1yzFgdQKgYM?tab=summary&timestamp=1310.0)
  - [Ensure "In Brief" section is included in the article](https://fathom.video/share/WQPWca_xxVhFgNUHfiBWM1yzFgdQKgYM?tab=summary&timestamp=1347.0)
  - [Leave status as "To Do" for Strapi team to review](https://fathom.video/share/WQPWca_xxVhFgNUHfiBWM1yzFgdQKgYM?tab=summary&timestamp=1587.0)

### Best Practices and Warnings

  - [Always save complete entries; avoid partial saves](https://fathom.video/share/WQPWca_xxVhFgNUHfiBWM1yzFgdQKgYM?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
  - [Don't change the status of the post; let Strapi team handle it](https://fathom.video/share/WQPWca_xxVhFgNUHfiBWM1yzFgdQKgYM?tab=summary&timestamp=1587.0)
  - [Be cautious of character limits, especially for long-tail keywords](https://fathom.video/share/WQPWca_xxVhFgNUHfiBWM1yzFgdQKgYM?tab=summary&timestamp=1282.0)
  - [Use appropriate CTAs based on the article's funnel stage (Top, Middle, Bottom)](https://fathom.video/share/WQPWca_xxVhFgNUHfiBWM1yzFgdQKgYM?tab=summary&timestamp=388.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Oluwatimilehin to review CTA documentation for better understanding](https://fathom.video/share/WQPWca_xxVhFgNUHfiBWM1yzFgdQKgYM?tab=summary&timestamp=737.0)
  - Practice using Strapi CMS with a test article
  - [Reach out to Usman via Slack for any questions during the process](https://fathom.video/share/WQPWca_xxVhFgNUHfiBWM1yzFgdQKgYM?tab=summary&timestamp=850.0)
  - [Ensure all article details are complete before saving in CMS](https://fathom.video/share/WQPWca_xxVhFgNUHfiBWM1yzFgdQKgYM?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
